summary: Iteration 48 - Monthly P&L Review feature testing complete. All features working correctly: Review view with month selector, Generate Review button, 7 KPI cards, Resort Health bar, AI narrative, Causal Factors, Outlet-by-Outlet Analysis with expandable cards, and Resort-wide Focus Areas. All 15 navigation tabs functional. Dead code cleanup verified (Culinary2/Pastry2 removed). Backend API returns complete review data with 6 outlets.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Review view elements verified, all 15 tabs working)

seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing EchoStratus data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 tested the new Monthly P&L Review feature in EchoStratus. All 15 navigation tabs work (Executive, Ask, Budget, Actuals, Review, Forecast, What-If, Projects, CapEx, Events, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk, POS/GL). The Review view generates comprehensive analysis with 7 KPI cards, health summary, AI narrative, causal factors (events, weather, occupancy), outlet-by-outlet analysis with expandable cards showing P&L details, discrepancies, and focus areas. Dead code cleanup verified - Culinary2 and Pastry2 modules removed without errors. Weather data is MOCKED (simulated by season/month). AI narrative uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback.

review_view.month_selector: PASS - dropdown with all months visible
review_view.kpi_cards: PASS - 7 cards (Revenue, EBITDA, Food%, Labor%, Events, Covers, Avg Check)
review_view.health_summary: PASS - data-testid='health-summary' with healthy/warning/critical counts and score
review_view.ai_narrative: PASS - data-testid='review-narrative' with EchoAI Monthly Intelligence Brief
review_view.causal_factors: PASS - data-testid='causal-factors' with events, weather, occupancy factors
review_view.outlet_reports: PASS - data-testid='outlet-reports' with 6 expandable outlet cards
review_view.outlet_expansion: PASS - clicking outlet shows detailed P&L, discrepancies, causal factors, focus areas

navigation.all_15_tabs: PASS - Executive, Ask, Budget, Actuals, Review, Forecast, What-If, Projects, CapEx, Events, Signals, Actions, Portfolio, Risk, POS/GL

dead_code_cleanup.culinary2_removed: PASS - no errors from removed module
dead_code_cleanup.pastry2_removed: PASS - no errors from removed module
dead_code_cleanup.zip_files: NOTE - some .zip files still exist in modules directory (MixologySommelier, PurchasingReceiving, VideoConference, Whiteboard)

backend_api.response_structure: PASS - resort_pnl, outlet_reports (6), causal_factors, discrepancies, focus_areas, health_summary, ai_narrative

mocked_apis.weather_data: MOCKED - simulated by season/month, no external weather API
mocked_apis.ai_narrative: Uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback if LLM times out
